channel.title: Blog on Your Name — Academic Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Your Name — Academic Portfolio

item.title: Getting Started with ROS 2: A Practical Guide
item.description: A beginner-friendly introduction to building robotics applications with ROS 2 Humble.

item.title: Transformer Architectures Explained Simply
item.description: A clear, visual walkthrough of how transformers work — attention, encoders, decoders, and why they changed AI.

item.title: My Research Workflow: Tools and Practices
item.description: A behind-the-scenes look at the tools, habits, and systems I use to stay productive in research.
